parameters.query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, a.id AS assignment_id
FROM users u
JOIN assignments a ON a.user_id = u.id
JOIN positions p ON p.id = a.position_id
WHERE u.sso_id = '409809c4-382d-45bc-adbd-78f9be3cafd4'
  AND p.role_id = 1
LIMIT 1;
SELECT id AS work_type_id FROM work_types ORDER BY id LIMIT 1;

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO shifts_plan (assignment_id, shift_date, start_time, end_time, duration, created_at)
  SELECT
    {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.assignment_id }},
    CURRENT_DATE,
    '08:00:00',
    '20:00:00',
    12,
    NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM shifts_plan
    WHERE assignment_id = {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.assignment_id }}
      AND shift_date = CURRENT_DATE
  )
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  (SELECT id FROM ins),
  (SELECT id FROM shifts_plan
   WHERE assignment_id = {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.assignment_id }}
     AND shift_date = CURRENT_DATE
   LIMIT 1)
) AS id;

INSERT INTO tasks (
  id,
  title,
  description,
  planned_minutes,
  creator_id,
  assignee_id,
  state,
  review_state,
  acceptance_policy,
  requires_photo,
  shift_id,
  work_type_id,
  source,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  'Выкладка — Кондитерка, чай, кофе',
  'Тестовая задача WFM',
  120,
  {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.user_id }},
  {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.user_id }},
  'NEW',
  'NONE',
  'MANUAL',
  false,
  {{ $json.id }},
  {{ $('Get work type').item.json.work_type_id }},
  'WFM',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;
